name: dgx-spark-trainer
description: Train and fine-tune language models locally on NVIDIA DGX Spark with Blackwell architecture. Supports three frameworks: Unsloth (2x faster training), LLaMA Factory (flexible YAML configs), and native Hugging Face TRL (full control with Transformers/PEFT). Covers SFT, DPO, LoRA, QLoRA training methods with 128GB unified memory for models up to 70B parameters.
